raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2941 requires health plans and health insurers to provide access to medically necessary health care services to patients displaced by a Governor-declared state of emergency.",
    "The new law allows health plans and health insurers to authorize care from out-of-network providers during a state of emergency.",
    "Under AB 2941, filing deadlines for claims can be extended for those affected by disasters.",
    "Prescription refill limitations can be suspended under the provisions of AB 2941.",
    "Patients can refill prescriptions at out-of-network pharmacies as per the new law.",
    "AB 2941 allows for the relaxation of time limits for referrals during a state of emergency.",
    "Medical equipment or supplies can be replaced as part of the provisions of AB 2941.",
    "The legislation is aimed at ensuring continued access to health care services for residents in rural and remote parts of California during emergencies.",
    "AB 2941 is designed to meet the medical needs of individuals and families impacted by disasters such as wildfires, floods, and earthquakes."
  ]
}
```
